# EasyJet Rejects $1.5B Castlelake Bid Amid Ongoing Talks

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | June 25, 2026*

---

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal
EasyJet Plc rejected a fourth bid by Castlelake LP that values the UK discount carrier at about £4.93 billion ($6.5 billion), while granting the investment firm more time to come back with another higher offer, in a sign that its opposition to a takeover might be waning.
